rationale: Both reviews identify the exact same 3 material scope violations directly visible in the diff (bundled AffineAlgGroup at L34-39, naive IsUnipotent at L49, and True-stub Reductive/Semisimple classes at L65-76 with no Layer 0-5 prerequisites), and prescribe identical actions that would excise them; no finding in one is ungrounded, more actionable, or missed by the other.
